inputs.name: q
inputs.desc: Query tensor [heads, tokens, head_dim] in head-major layout

runtime_buffers.name: k
runtime_buffers.desc: Key tensor [kv_heads, seq_len, head_dim] in strided head-major layout

runtime_buffers.name: v
runtime_buffers.desc: Value tensor [kv_heads, seq_len, head_dim] in strided head-major layout

outputs.name: out
outputs.desc: Attention output [heads, tokens, head_dim] in head-major layout

params.name: kv_stride_tokens
params.desc: Stride in tokens for the K/V layout

params.name: aligned_head_dim
params.desc: Aligned row stride used by the runtime buffers

constraints.notes: Exact full-sequence GQA attention used for parity-sensitive encoder prefill.

impl.c_declaration: void attention_forward_full_head_major_gqa_exact_strided(const float *q, const float *k, const float *v, float *output, int num_heads, int num_kv_heads, int num_tokens, int head_dim, int aligned_head_dim, int kv_stride_tokens);

notes: Full / bidirectional grouped-query attention with exact softmax accumulation for parity-sensitive encoder paths.
